response.justification: The candidate vastly exceeds the technical bar for this entry-level role, with deep TypeScript/Node, React, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and recent LLM/agentic experience that maps directly onto the required and nice-to-have skills. They are Berlin-based with basic German, fitting the high on-site requirement. The central risk is overqualification: this is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years applying to a junior/mid IC position, raising concerns about salary expectations, retention, and role satisfaction. PostgreSQL and Nest.js are not explicitly evidenced, though strong relational and Node fundamentals make these trivial to pick up.
strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node and React experience well beyond requirements
Strong DevOps/cloud skills (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes) plus recent LLM/agentic work
Berlin-based with basic German, matching the high on-site presence requirement
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level IC role (Staff/Senior, 15+ years)
Likely retention and salary-expectation mismatch for a junior position
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience listed
